data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Rating both directions', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that both parties rate each other after completion, there are no concrete examples or data points demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that both parties can rate each other.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
